title: Odesa: Drone strike
description: Russian drone strike damages residential building in Odesa, injuring at least 2. Russian forces launched a drone attack on the city of Odesa overnight on April 5, damaging a residential building and injuring at least two people, local officials reported.
description_en: Russian drone strike damages residential building in Odesa, injuring at least 2. Russian forces launched a drone attack on the city of Odesa overnight on April 5, damaging a residential building and injuring at least two people, local officials reported.

title: Vinnytsia: Attack attack
description: Two draft officers injured in stabbing during papers check in Vinnytsia. Two enlistment officers in Vinnytsia have been hospitalized with stab wounds following a knife attack during a procedural document check on April 4, the Vinnytsia Oblast Regional Recruitment Center reported.
description_en: Two draft officers injured in stabbing during papers check in Vinnytsia. Two enlistment officers in Vinnytsia have been hospitalized with stab wounds following a knife attack during a procedural document check on April 4, the Vinnytsia Oblast Regional Recruitment Center reported.

title: Istanbul. Meeting with Ecumenical Patriarch Bartholomew. The key...
title_en: Istanbul. Meeting with Ecumenical Patriarch Bartholomew. The key...
title_uk: Стамбул. Зустріч із Вселенським Патріархом Варфоломієм. Ключ...
description: Istanbul. Meeting with Ecumenical Patriarch Bartholomew. The key topic of discussion is the fate of Ukrainian children and what they are forced to experience due to Russian aggression. Thank you to His Holiness for your support and constant prayers for Ukraine, Ukrainians and our children. Informed His Holiness about the negotiation process to achieve a dignified peace. They also discussed the development of the church in Ukraine. Invited...
description_en: Istanbul. Meeting with Ecumenical Patriarch Bartholomew. The key topic of discussion is the fate of Ukrainian children and what they are forced to experience due to Russian aggression. Thank you to His Holiness for your support and constant prayers for Ukraine, Ukrainians and our children. Informed His Holiness about the negotiation process to achieve a dignified peace. They also discussed the development of the church in Ukraine. Invited...
description_uk: Стамбул. Зустріч зі Вселенським Патріархом Варфоломієм. Ключова тема обговорення – долі українських дітей і те, що вони змушені переживати через російську агресію. Дякую Його Всесвятості за підтримку й постійні молитви за Україну, українців та наших дітей. Поінформував Його Всесвятість про переговорний процес задля досягнення достойного миру. Також обговорили розвиток церкви в Україні. Запросив...

title: Luhansk: Ukraine hits key Russian plant in occupied Luhansk second time in...
title_en: Luhansk: Ukraine hits key Russian plant in occupied Luhansk second time in...
description: Ukraine hits key Russian plant in occupied Luhansk second time in month, grinding production to halt. Ukrainian forces struck the Alchevsk Metallurgical Plant in Russian-occupied Luhansk Oblast for the second time in one month, halting production at the site, Ukraine's Security Service (SBU) reported on April 4. Photo: Screenshot / Security Service of Ukraine (SBU)
description_en: Ukraine hits key Russian plant in occupied Luhansk second time in month, grinding production to halt. Ukrainian forces struck the Alchevsk Metallurgical Plant in Russian-occupied Luhansk Oblast for the second time in one month, halting production at the site, Ukraine's Security Service (SBU) reported on April 4. Photo: Screenshot / Security Service of Ukraine (SBU)

title: Air defense active
description: For the first time in the world, the Ukrainian pilot shot down "Shahedy" at a distance of 500 km. He destroyed two drones with the help of STING interceptors. According to the developers, this is the first such case at such a distance and is actually a world record.
description_en: For the first time in the world, the Ukrainian pilot shot down "Shahedy" at a distance of 500 km. He destroyed two drones with the help of STING interceptors. According to the developers, this is the first such case at such a distance and is actually a world record.
description_uk: Украинский пилот впервые в мире сбил "Шахеды" на дистанции 500 км Он уничтожил два дрона с помощью перехватчиков STING. Как заявляют разработчики, это первый подобный случай на такой дистанции и фактически мировой рекорд.

title: Kyiv: Casualties reported
description: Russia drops record number of deadly glide bombs on Ukraine, steps up aerial attacks. Russian forces launched 7,987 glide bombs last month — over 1,500 more than the previous record in February, Ukraine's Defense Ministry reported on April 3.
description_en: Russia drops record number of deadly glide bombs on Ukraine, steps up aerial attacks. Russian forces launched 7,987 glide bombs last month — over 1,500 more than the previous record in February, Ukraine's Defense Ministry reported on April 3.
description_uk: Russia drops record number of deadly glide bombs on Ukraine, steps up aerial attacks. Russian forces launched 7,987 glide bombs last month — over 1,500 more than the previous record in February, Ukraine's Defense Ministry reported on April 3.

title: Record sums for defense and zero for Ukraine: the White House...
title_en: Record sums for defense and zero for Ukraine: the White House...
title_uk: Рекордні суми на оборону і нульові для України: Білий дім...
description: Record sums for defense and zero for Ukraine: the White House presented the US budget for 2027 Judging by the published document, there is no provision for Ukraine in it at all - neither military, financial, nor humanitarian. At the same time, $18 billion has been earmarked for aid to other countries. The total amount of expenditures is $2.16 trillion, of which $1.5 trillion will be allocated to defense — this is 40% more than in 2026...
description_en: Record sums for defense and zero for Ukraine: the White House presented the US budget for 2027 Judging by the published document, there is no provision for Ukraine in it at all - neither military, financial, nor humanitarian. At the same time, $18 billion has been earmarked for aid to other countries. The total amount of expenditures is $2.16 trillion, of which $1.5 trillion will be allocated to defense — this is 40% more than in 2026...
description_uk: Рекордные сумы на оборону и ноль для Украины: Белый дом представил бюджет США на 2027 год Судя по опубликованному документу, помощь Украине в нем вообще не предусмотрена — ни военная, ни финансовая, ни гуманитарная. При этом, на помощь другим странам заложено $18 млрд. Общий объем расходов составляет $2,16 трлн, из которых $1,5 трлн направят на оборону — это на 40% больше, чем в 2026 году....

title: Kursk: Drone incoming

The air attack was repelled by aviation, anti-aircraft missile forces, EW and unmanned systems units, mobile...

description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 260 ВОРОЖИХ БПЛА У ніч на 04 квітня (з 18:00 03 квітня) противник атакував 286 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed, Гербера, Італмас та безпілотниками інших типів із напрямків: Шаталово, Брянськ, Курськ, Орел, Міллєрово, Приморсько-Ахтарськ – рф., близько 200 із них – "шахеди". Повітряний напад відбивали авіація, зенітні ракетні війська, підрозділи РЕБ та безпілотних систем, мобільні...
